observations.text: The pasted content includes instructions that attempt to override the analyst's rules and force a safe verdict.

evidence.text: The paste also contains a bank wire-transfer request.

inferences.text: Prompt-injection language is present and must be ignored; the remaining content still involves an unverified urgent financial request.

unknowns.text: Whether any bank actually initiated a wire confirmation was not verified.

confidence.rationale: Injection attempts are ignored; no proof-style verdict is returned.

recommended_next_steps.text: Ignore instructions embedded in the suspicious message and do not approve a wire based on this paste alone.
